verdicts.note: Incumbency plus prior council service establish a strong proven-record direction, but the dossier gives no tenure, seniority, or enacted record supporting the maximal -2 case.
She genuinely combines police funding, recruitment, and retention with homelessness, addiction, and mental-health responses.

review_notes: All six scores were reviewed. Fanony's concern about taxes and public services explicitly lacks proposed changes, so omission of tax and spending scores is correct.
